reviews.comment:
Paramos la noche del 9 de Enero 2021, y perfecto todo. Precio acorde, instalaciones MUY limpias y prolijas, lindo motel rutero. El trato del personal muy cordial y predispuesto.

(Translated by Google)
We stayed the night of January 9, 2021, and everything was perfect. The price was reasonable, the facilities were very clean and tidy, and it was a nice roadside motel. The staff was very friendly and helpful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5cXJ2dXpBRRAB

reviews.comment:
NADIE SE PUEDE PERDER EL EXCELENTE SANDWICH DE JAMON CRUDO CON PAN CASERO QUE ELABORAN EN EL LUGAR. ES TÍPICO DE ESE PARAJE!
ADEMÁS DE UNA MUY BUENA ATENCIÓN.

(Translated by Google)
No one should miss the excellent prosciutto sandwich on homemade bread that they make there. It's a local specialty!
And the service is very good too.
